title: onosma atrocyanea
intro: Onosma atrocyanea, also known as the yellow monkshood, is a perennial plant species in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The roots and leaves of Onosma atrocyanea have been found to exhibit various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
